raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute the charges related to my credit card account and to request an immediate investigation into this matter under the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ) and the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act ( FDCPA ). 

, I made a payment to Ascend of XXXX for my rent using my credit card, with the understanding that doing so would prevent any eviction proceedings against me. Despite fulfilling my obligation and making the payment, I was later surprised to learn that Landlord initiated eviction proceedings against me, resulting in a default judgment in court. This situation is not only unjust but has also severely impacted my credit report and financial standing.

I have reached out to your customer service department multiple times, providing all relevant documentation to support my case, including : 1. A copy of my rental payment receipt.

2. Correspondence with my landlord confirming the payment and the agreement not to evict me.

3. Court documents showing the default judgment.

Despite providing this evidence, I have not received any assistance or resolution from your team. According to the FCRA, I am entitled to accurate reporting of my credit account, and the current status is misleading and damaging to my credit profile.
